items.title: From pain comes perseverance. From frustration comes fight. From disappointment comes determination.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
From pain comes perseverance. From frustration comes fight. From disappointment comes determination.

After a magical season gone up in smoke like a puff from Jeremy Sochan's victory cigar, that is the Spurs' hope anyway.

On what comes next for Wembanyama, Spurs:
www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
KAT went to a temple in Taoyuan,Taiwan before the season started. He used jiaobei (筊杯) to ask ancestors if the Knicks would win a championship.

The answer was yes.

(h/t IG @taiwanbeerleopards)

items.title: June 14, 1995: Bob Costas reports that Dominique Wilkins "will probably" remain with the Boston Celtics for the 1995-96 season, and the Heat "are expected to" name Bob Huggins as head coach.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 14, 1995: Bob Costas reports that Dominique Wilkins "will probably" remain with the Boston Celtics for the 1995-96 season, and the Heat "are expected to" name Bob Huggins as head coach.

*Wilkins played the '95-96 season in Greece. Pat Riley became Miami's head coach.

📺 NBC
